news.title: Valve says Steam Machine's price is "significantly more" than it originally envisaged, and the launch quantity is "less than we wanted to be able to make"
news.titleEN: Valve says Steam Machine's price is "significantly more" than it originally envisaged, and the launch quantity is "less than we wanted to be able to make"
news.desc: The price of the Steam Machine is "significantly more" than Valve would have liked to launch it at, Valve has told Eurogamer, and it hasn't been able to make as many units of the new console-like PC as it wanted to, either. Read more
news.descEN: The price of the Steam Machine is "significantly more" than Valve would have liked to launch it at, Valve has told Eurogamer, and it hasn't been able to make as many units of the new console-like PC as it wanted to, either. Read more

news.title: Valve finally announces the price of Steam Machine and a sort of release date, but the console-like PC might cost more than you're expecting
news.titleEN: Valve finally announces the price of Steam Machine and a sort of release date, but the console-like PC might cost more than you're expecting
news.desc: Earlier this month, Valve reaffirmed its commitment to shipping the Steam Machine this summer. Today, it officially announced pricing, initial shipping dates, and many remaining details, including specs, for the living room PC. Read more

news.title: Ultima's creator Richard Garriott is planning to win back the rights to his legendary RPG from EA with an 50-year-old copyright quirk

news.title: The Last of Us Part 2 will get multiplayer later this year, but not from Sony, and sadly not on PS5 either
